plugins.name: Eporner
plugins.description: Free-text search and web recommendations from eporner.com. No API key required.

plugins.name: ThePornDB
plugins.description: PHASH/URL scene fingerprint resolver, performer metadata, and free-text search from theporndb.net. Needs an API key.

plugins.name: StashDB
plugins.description: OSHASH/PHASH scene fingerprint resolver, performer metadata, and free-text search from stashdb.org (stash-box). Needs an API key.

plugins.name: XVideos
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment from xvideos.com. No API key required.

plugins.name: Pornzog
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment from pornzog.com. No API key required.

plugins.name: YouPorn
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment from youporn.com. No API key required.

plugins.name: PornHub
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment from pornhub.com. No API key required. May need a browser UA or age-consent cookie on some deployments.

plugins.name: NoodleMagazine
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment from noodlemagazine.com. No API key required. Cloudflare-gated: live scraping needs a fetcher that can pass the JS challenge.

plugins.name: xHamster
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment from xhamster.com. No API key required. Cloudflare-fronted; may need a browser UA on some deployments.

plugins.name: Beeg
plugins.description: Free-text search and web recommendations from beeg.com. No API key required.

plugins.name: MissAV
plugins.description: Free-text search and scene enrichment for JAV titles from missav.ws. No API key required. Cloudflare-gated: needs a host fetcher that can pass the JS challenge (fetch: js).
